attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

- **Potato**: A brown potato is also in the sink basin, next to the egg. It is an object.
- **Bread**: A loaf of dark brown bread is on the dining table.
- **Tomato**: A red tomato is on the dining table.
- **Coffee Maker**: A beige coffee maker is on the dining table. It is an object and appears to be off.
- **Bottles**: Two bottles (one clear, one blue) are on the dining table. They are objects.
- **Chair**: A wooden chair is next to the dining table. It is not a receptacle or object in the domain.

**Spatial Relationships and Current State:**

- The **sink** contains an **egg** and a **potato**. This means `(inReceptacle egg sink)` and `(inReceptacle potato sink)` are true.
- The **knife** is on the countertop near the sink (first and fourth images) and also on the dining table (third image). The domain allows for multiple instances or movement, but for planning, the robot can pick up the one near the sink.

    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

    Instruction: Put a washed slice of lettuce on the counter by the sink.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
Scene Description:

The scene depicts a kitchen environment with a countertop, sink, cabinets, a refrigerator, and a dining table. The primary goal is to place a washed slice of lettuce on the counter beside the sink. The following objects and their states are relevant to the planning task:

1. Objects and Their Types:
   - Receptacles:
     - Sink: A rectangular stainless steel sink embedded in the countertop, with a faucet above it. It is a receptacle capable of holding objects for cleaning.
     - Fridge: A tall, black refrigerator with double doors, located to the right of the cabinets. It is openable and currently closed.
     - Countertop: The flat surface adjacent to the sink and cabinets, which can hold objects. It is not defined as a receptacle in the domain but serves as a placement surface.
     - Cabinets: Light beige cabinets under the countertop; they are openable but not currently opened.
   - Objects:
     - Lettuce: A green, round head of lettuce located on the wooden dining table. It is not sliced and not cleaned.
     - Knife: A yellow-handled knife. One is on the countertop near the sink (first image), another is on the dining table (third image). Both are of the same type and can be used for slicing.
     - Egg: A brown egg visible in the sink (first and fourth images) and on the table (third image). It is not relevant to the current task.
     - Potato: A dark brown potato in the sink (first and fourth images). Not relevant.
     - Bread, Tomato, Soap Dispenser, Salt Shaker, Coffee Machine: Present on the dining table but irrelevant to the task.

2. Quantities:
   - Lettuce: 1 head.
   - Knife: 2 (one on countertop near sink, one on table).
   - Sink: 1.
   - Fridge: 1.
   - Cabinets: Multiple units, but treated as one functional unit for domain purposes.

3. Spatial Relationships:
   - The sink is embedded in the countertop on the left side of the scene.
   - The knife on the countertop is positioned to the left of the sink.
   - The lettuce is on the round wooden dining table, which is to the right and slightly forward from the sink area.
   - The fridge is to the right of the cabinets, against the back wall.
   - The egg and potato are inside the sink basin in some views, indicating they are in the receptacle “sink”.
   - The agent is not initially located at any object; it must first navigate to an object to interact.

4. Current State of Objects (Relevant to Task):
   - Lettuce: Not sliced, not cleaned, located on the table.
   - Knife (on countertop): Not held, located near sink.
   - Knife (on table): Not held, located next to lettuce.
   - Sink: Not currently holding the lettuce; it is empty except for egg and potato in some views.
   - Fridge: Closed, not opened.
   - Cabinets: Closed, not opened.
   - Agent: Not at any location; must first go to an object (e.g., lettuce or knife).

5. Visual Properties:
   - Lettuce: Green, round, leafy texture, on a light brown wooden table.
   - Knife: Yellow handle, metallic blade; one is lying horizontally on the countertop, another on the table.
   - Sink: Stainless steel, rectangular, with visible faucet and drain.
   - Countertop: Beige marble pattern, smooth surface.
   - Fridge: Black, glossy finish, with red and blue indicator lights on the door.
   - Lighting: Sunlight casts shadows and bright spots on the countertop and sink, indicating a window or light source from the left.

To accomplish the task, the robot must:
- Navigate to the lettuce on the table.
- Pick up the lettuce.
- Navigate to the knife (either one; the one on the table is more accessible).
- Pick up the knife.
- Slice the lettuce (using the knife while holding it).
- Navigate to the sink.
- Clean the sliced lettuce in the sink.
- Place the washed, sliced lettuce on the countertop beside the sink.

Note: The lettuce must be sliced before cleaning, as per typical kitchen logic, and the domain allows slicing while holding the knife and the object. The sink is the only receptacle for cleaning. The final placement is on the countertop, which is not a receptacle but is the target surface for the task.

```pddl
(define (problem put_washed_sliced_lettuce)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        lettuce - object
        knife1 knife2 - knife
        sink1 - sink
        countertop1 - object
        fridge1 - fridge
        cabinet1 - receptacle
        table1 - object
        egg1 potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 table1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 countertop1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 cabinet1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife2))
        (not (atLocation agent1 lettuce))
        (not (atLocation agent1 egg1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato1))

        ; Objects are at their initial locations
        (atLocation agent1 table1) ; Assuming agent starts near table for simplicity, or can be changed
        (atLocation lettuce table1)
        (atLocation knife1 countertop1)
        (atLocation knife2 table1)
        (atLocation egg1 sink1)
        (atLocation potato1 sink1)

        ; Receptacles are not opened
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable cabinet1)
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (not (opened cabinet1))

        ; Lettuce is not sliced or cleaned
        (not (isSliced lettuce))
        (not (isClean lettuce))

        ; Agent is not holding anything
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle lettuce countertop1) ; Placed on countertop beside sink
            (isClean lettuce)
            (isSliced lettuce)
        )
    )
)
```

(define (problem put_washed_sliced_lettuce)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        lettuce - object
        knife1 knife2 - knife
        sink1 - sink
        countertop1 - object
        fridge1 - fridge
        cabinet1 - receptacle
        table1 - object
        egg1 potato1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 table1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 countertop1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 fridge1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 cabinet1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 knife2))
        (not (atLocation agent1 lettuce))
        (not (atLocation agent1 egg1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 potato1))

        ; Objects are at their initial locations
        (atLocation agent1 table1) ; Assuming agent starts near table for simplicity, or can be changed
        (atLocation lettuce table1)
        (atLocation knife1 countertop1)
        (atLocation knife2 table1)
        (atLocation egg1 sink1)
        (atLocation potato1 sink1)

        ; Receptacles are not opened

        (openable cabinet1)

        (not (isClean lettuce))

            (isSliced lettuce)
        )

                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

```pddl
(define (problem put_task_lettuce)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        sink - sink
        fridge - fridge
        cabinet - receptacle
        countertop - object
        table - object
        knife - knife
        lettuce - object
        egg - object
        potato - object
        bread - object
        tomato - object
        coffee_machine - object
    )
    (:init
        (openable sink)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable cabinet)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (opened cabinet))
        (inReceptacle potato sink)
        (inReceptacle egg sink)
        (atLocation knife table)
        (atLocation knife countertop)
        (atLocation lettuce table)
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean lettuce))
        (not (isSliced lettuce))
        (not (atLocation robot sink))
        (not (atLocation robot fridge))
        (not (atLocation robot cabinet))
        (not (atLocation robot countertop))
        (not (atLocation robot table))
        (not (atLocation robot knife))
        (not (atLocation robot lettuce))
        (not (atLocation robot egg))
        (not (atLocation robot potato))
        (not (atLocation robot bread))
        (not (atLocation robot tomato))
        (not (atLocation robot coffee_machine))
    )
    (:goal (and
        (atLocation robot countertop)
        (inReceptacle lettuce countertop)
        (isClean lettuce)
        (isSliced lettuce)
    ))
)
```
final.problem:
(define (problem put_task_lettuce)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        sink - sink
        fridge - fridge
        cabinet - receptacle
        countertop - object
        table - object
        knife - knife
        lettuce - object
        egg - object
        potato - object
        bread - object
        tomato - object
        coffee_machine - object
    )
    (:init
        (openable sink)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable cabinet)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (opened cabinet))
        (inReceptacle potato sink)
        (inReceptacle egg sink)
        (atLocation knife table)
        (atLocation knife countertop)
        (atLocation lettuce table)
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean lettuce))
        (not (isSliced lettuce))
        (not (atLocation robot sink))
        (not (atLocation robot fridge))
        (not (atLocation robot cabinet))
        (not (atLocation robot countertop))
        (not (atLocation robot table))
        (not (atLocation robot knife))
        (not (atLocation robot lettuce))
        (not (atLocation robot egg))
        (not (atLocation robot potato))
        (not (atLocation robot bread))
        (not (atLocation robot tomato))
        (not (atLocation robot coffee_machine))
    )
    (:goal (and
        (atLocation robot countertop)
        (inReceptacle lettuce countertop)
        (isClean lettuce)
        (isSliced lettuce)
    ))
)
